testcase.name: completeOrder
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (6089a0ca04ee1e3b655a040bd135883c)] -> xpath: //input[@onclick='PaymentInfo.save()']] (tried for 5 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.39.0', revision: '126f156aee' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.103, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\premjain\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51854}, goog:processID: 7072, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51854/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.103, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 6089a0ca04ee1e3b655a040bd135883c at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at utility.WaitUtil.waitForElementToBeClickable(WaitUtil.java:24) at pages.CheckoutPage.ShippingAndPaymentSteps(CheckoutPage.java:72) at tests.EndToEndTest.completeOrder(EndToEndTest.java:45) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... testcase.name: completeOrder

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.cssSelector: input[onclick='Billing.save()']' (tried for 5 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
